notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds into a double play, pitcher Calvin Faucher to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Drew Gilbert out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Jonah Cox out at 2nd. Willy Adames out at 1st.
